{{Infobox group
| name = Gardener
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

''See also: [[Gardener Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gardeners]] are members of an [[Imperial]] [[Guild]] tasked with maintaining stability within the [[Empire]]. By providing a structured way for individuals to resolve conflicts through their organization, they prevent the rise of private armies and the fragmentation of the nation. [[The Guild]] is highly respected and offers a lucrative, prestigious career path that many [[Readers]] aspire to join. While some individuals with high potential are inducted into the [[Architects]], [[Gardeners]] accept dangerous assignments that involve frequent transitions to violence. The role involves specialized skills, such as the ability to remain perfectly still and unstimulated for long periods. [[Gardeners]] are known for their stealth, often remaining undetected by others. They are also associated with the use of shears—specialized tools that can be wide-bladed bronze weapons or small silver knives. Some [[Gardeners]] are identified as [[Consultant assassins]], and the group is led by a [[High Gardener]]. The [[Council]] holds the authority to decide which targets are to be pruned, a task performed exclusively by the [[Gardeners]].}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Within the [[Guild]], a Gardener is an apprentice role or title that can be sent after specific targets. [[Kerian]] serves as the sole Gardener on the mission, though the title is also held by [[Meia]] and was first claimed by an [[Am’haranai]] who predates the current line of assassin blades. These individuals are never unarmed, typically utilizing shears to prune only necessary branches. While a single Gardener is considered more powerful than [[Shera]], the subject's disposition is noted as unsuitable for an ideal practitioner of the role.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kerian]] is the only [[Gardener]] on the mission.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gardener]] is a role or title held by [[Kerian]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] has no chance against one [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gardeners]] are entities that can be sent after people.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Gardener]] is expected to 'prune' only the necessary branches.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Gardeners]] are a type of apprentice or role.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] is referred to as [[Gardener]] [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Gardener]] is a role or title within the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The first [[Am’haranai]] to call herself a [[Gardener]] predates the current line of assassin blades.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Gardener]] is never unarmed.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]]'s smile is described as the smile of a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Gardener]] uses shears.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The subject's disposition is unsuitable for an ideal [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] stated she would never have seen a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lucan]] is a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Gardeners]] are a specialized group of [[Consultant assassins]], which includes the member [[Shera]], who utilize ancient bronze daggers known as shears. Their rigorous training curriculum intentionally avoids philosophy and teaches them the discipline to remain unstimulated and motionless for several hours. During their service, members have been known to engage in physical feats such as throwing [[Lucan]] for months at a time. More recently, the group has been withdrawn from their usual duties to focus on defending the [[island]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Gardeners]] are a type of [[Consultant]] assassin who use 'shears', which are ancient bronze daggers.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] was thrown by a [[Gardener]] for months.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Gardeners]] are a group that includes [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Gardeners]] learn the ability to sit still and unstimulated for hours.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] is addressed as a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Gardeners]] have a curriculum that does not encourage philosophy.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Gardeners]] were being withdrawn to defend the [[island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] refers to a group called the [[Gardeners]] in relation to sealing the building.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Gardener]] vanished.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|During a recent gathering, it was noted that only one true Gardener was present among the group. [[Shera]] displayed traits of the affiliation by thinking like a Gardener and even utilizing one of their classic jokes. While [[Lucan]] has demonstrated the work ethic of any Gardener over the past two years, [[Zhen]] expressed that he felt no need to provide information to such an individual. Within this context, the Gardener serves as a specific type of mission or affiliation that utilizes specialized weapons designed to immobilize targets. The chaos escalated when a rogue Gardener released an alchemical gas charge into the basement.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|There was only one true [[Gardener]] among the group tonight.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] uses a classic [[Gardener]] joke.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] was thinking like a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] has worked as hard as any [[Gardener]] over the last two years.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Zhen]] mentions he does not need to tell a [[Gardener]] information.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gardener]] is a type of mission or affiliation.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gardener]] weapons are used to immobilize people.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A rogue [[Gardener]] dropped an alchemical gas charge into the basement.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Gardener Meia. Have you sworn Gardener Shera to secrecy?”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|"He’s far from the template of an ideal Gardener,"<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Upon induction into the Consultants, each Gardener was given a pair of “shears”: ancient bronze daggers that had been wielded by generations of assassins since before the founding of the Aurelian Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“Gather your team, Gardener. You have work to do.”<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
